servers.description: Use this URL to request operations on display-api.

patch.description: Performs partial updates on existing campaigns in bulk. Only fields explicitly included in the request body will be modified; all other campaign attributes remain unchanged. Max batch size: 10. advertiserId must be the same across all items in the payload. Fields can be cleared by passing null. All of budgetType, dailyBudget, totalBudget, startDate, endDate, and deliverySpeed must be set at same level i.e. either at campaign level or ad group level.

example3.summary: Remove description and update campaign name

invalidValueNull.summary: A non-nullable field is explicitly set to null

invalidTypeForFields.summary: The field value does not match its expected data type

invalidPatchFields.summary: Unknown or unrecognized fields in PATCH body (like status, mediaType etc)

totalAndDailyBudgetNotAllowed.summary: Both totalBudget AND dailyBudget should not be present together

totalBudgetShouldBeEmptyForDaily.summary: budgetType=DAILY with totalBudget should not be present

dailyBudgetShouldBeEmptyForTotal.summary: budgetType=TOTAL with dailyBudget should not be  present

multipleAdvertisersNotSupported.summary: Multiple advertiserId values in bulk request

totalBudgetNotAllowedForDaily.summary: Existing budgetType=DAILY and patch has totalBudget without budgetType

dailyBudgetNotAllowedForTotal.summary: Existing budgetType=TOTAL and patch has dailyBudget without budgetType

budgetAmountNeedsToBeSet.summary: Switching budget type but missing the new budget amount

patch.description: Performs partial updates on existing ad groups in bulk. Only fields explicitly included in the request body will be modified; all other attributes remain unchanged. Max batch size: 10. advertiserId must be the same across all items in the payload. Supports both expression-based and flattened targeting structures (not mixed). Supports delta targeting updates (add/remove) for keywords and audiences. Fields can be cleared by passing null.

example1.summary: Update name, frequencyCapDay, frequencyCapWeek and targeting (Expression based)

example2.summary: Update name, frequencyCapDay, frequencyCapWeek and targeting (Flattened)

example4.summary: Update multiple adGroups with add/remove keywords (Flattened, delta targeting)

adGroupEndDateCannotBeNull.summary: End date cannot be null if schedule and budget are defined at ad group level

endDateMustBeLaterThanStartDate.summary: End date must be later than start date

startDateShouldBeWithinYear.summary: Start date should be within a year from the current date

eitherDailyOrTotalBudgetCanBeSet.summary: Either daily or total budget can be set for an ad group

invalidTargetingCombination.summary: Only geo targeting can be combined with any other targetings

adGroupInvalidNameSize.summary: Ad group name length must be between 4 and 1024 characters

adGroupStartAndEndDateShouldBeNull.summary: Start and end date should be null if schedule and budget are defined at campaign level

rosAdGroupCannotHaveTargetingDetailsSet.summary: Run of site ad group cannot have targeting details set

moreThanOneTargetingCannotBeSelected.summary: More than one targeting tactic cannot be selected

startDateCannotBeNull.summary: Start date cannot be null if schedule and budget are defined at ad group level

budgetFieldCannotBeNegative.summary: Budget must be greater than or equal to 0

dailyCapCannotBeGreaterThanWeeklyCap.summary: Daily cap can't be greater than weekly cap

dailyCapCannotBeGreaterThanMonthlyCap.summary: Daily cap can't be greater than monthly cap

weeklyCapCannotBeGreaterThanMonthlyCap.summary: Weekly cap can't be greater than monthly cap

frontloadedNotAllowedForDailyBudgetType.summary: Frontloaded delivery is not allowed for daily budget type

totalAndDailyBudgetNotAllowedTogether.summary: Either daily or total budget can be set, not both

invalidGeoTargetType.summary: Invalid geo target type value. Supported values are [STATE, CITY, DMA, COUNTRY]

adGroupStartOrEndDateCannotBeInPastDurin.summary: AdGroup startDate/endDate can't be in past during pre flight

adGroupEndDateOnlyUnlimitedForDraftAdGro.summary: End date cannot be empty (Unlimited) for other than draft ad groups

endDateCannotBeUnlimitedForCampaignIfDef.summary: End date cannot be set for campaign if schedule is defined at ad group level

maxBidLessThanExpectedValue.summary: Max bid less than expected value

midFlightChangesNotSupported.summary: AdGroup targeting cannot be updated during mid flight

biddingCannotBeChangedDuringMidFlight.summary: Bidding cannot be changed when adGroup is in mid flight, scheduled, paused or completed state

geoLocationIdCannotBeEmptyOrNull.summary: Geo location id / zipCode both cannot be empty or null

noAudienceDetailFetched.summary: No audience detail fetched for given audience type and attribute

differenceBetweenStartAndEndDateCrossedL.summary: Difference between start date and end date crossed limit

duplicateAdGroupRequest.summary: Two or more entries with same adgroup identifier are not allowed in a request

invalidAdGroupCampaignId.summary: AdGroup does not belong to the campaign id passed in the request

advertiserId.description: ID of the advertiser for whom the campaign(s) should be updated. Must be valid advertiser ID.

campaignId.description: Identifier of campaign to update. Must be a valid campaign ID.

name.description: Name of the campaign. Maximum length: 240 characters. Must be unique.

description.description: Description of the campaign. Maximum length: 240 characters.

objective.description: Campaign objective. You can update objective only for draft campaigns.

campaignType.description: Type of campaign. Only onsite display auction campaigns are supported today. You cannot update campaignType after campaign is created.

startDate.description: Campaign start date. ISO 8601 format: yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSXXX. Must be a time after 12pm ET.

endDate.description: Campaign end date. ISO 8601 format: yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSXXX. Use 9999-12-30T00:00:00Z for indefinite run.

dailyBudget.description: Daily budget of the campaign. Required if budgetType is daily and if not set at ad group level. Minimum value: $0.01. Daily budget cannot exceed your total budget amount. Up to 20% of the unspent budget will be rolled over to the next day. Campaigns scheduled to run indefinitely must use a daily budget.

totalBudget.description: Total budget of the campaign. Required if budgetType is total and if not set at ad group level. Minimum value: $0.01.

deliverySpeed.description: Delivery pacing strategy. You can update it only for campaigns in DRAFT state. Frontloaded pacing not supported if budgetType is daily.

ErrorResponse.description: Standard error response returned for validation and server failures

details.description: List of specific error codes describing the failure

startIndex.description: return the first ten Campaigns set startIndex=0

count.description: to return the first ten Campaigns set startIndex=0 and defaultCount=100, maxCount=100, minCount=1

advertiserId.description: ID of the advertiser for whom the ad group(s) should be updated.

adGroupId.description: Identifier of ad group to update.

name.description: Name of the ad group. Maximum length: 255 characters.

startDate.description: Date on which the ad group is set to go live. ISO 8601 format: yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSXXX. Required if set at ad group level.

endDate.description: Date when the ad group ends. ISO 8601 format: yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSXXX. Use 9999-12-30T00:00:00Z for indefinite run. Required if set at ad group level.

rateType.description: Rate type refers to the pricing structure.

budgetType.description: Type of budget allocation. Required if not set at the campaign level. Ad groups scheduled to run indefinitely must use a daily budget.

dailyBudget.description: Daily budget of the ad group. Required if budgetType is set to daily. Minimum value: $0.01.

totalBudget.description: Total budget of the ad group. Required if budgetType is set to total. Minimum value: $0.01.

deliverySpeed.description: Determines pacing of ad delivery. Required if not set at the campaign level. Note: frontloaded pacing is not supported if budgetType is daily.

creativeRotationMode.description: Specifies the rotation strategy for creatives within an ad group during delivery.

frequencyCapDay.description: Number of times the ad should be shown to the same user in a day. Valid range: 1-511. Pass null to clear.

frequencyCapWeek.description: Number of times the ad should be shown to the same user in a week. Valid range: 3-511. Pass null to clear.

frequencyCapMonth.description: Number of times the ad should be shown to the same user in a month. Valid range: 5-511. Pass null to clear.

maxBid.description: Maximum bid value for the ad group. Minimum value: $0.01. Can be cleared/unset only in draft state.

AdGroupErrorResponse.description: Standard error response returned for validation and server failures in AdGroup operations

details.description: List of specific error codes describing the failure

items.description: List of possible validation, business, and processing error codes for AdGroup Patch operations

resolution.description: Desired pixel-density resolution (1X or 2X). Defaults to 1X if not provided.

status.description:
status represents the high-level lifecycle state of the creative:
- PENDING_APPROVAL: The creative has been submitted for moderation and is not yet in a final approved or rejected state. When status=PENDING_APPROVAL, clients can use detailedStatus to understand the specific stage of the moderation workflow.
- APPROVED: The creative has completed moderation and is approved for use. This is a final moderation outcome.
- REJECTED: The creative has completed moderation and was rejected. This is a final moderation outcome. If the user appeals the rejected creative, the creative may move back into the moderation flow with status=PENDING_APPROVAL.

detailedStatus.description:
Detailed moderation status of the creative: - CREATIVE_REVIEW: The creative is currently being reviewed by the moderation team. - NEEDS_MORE_INFORMATION: The reviewer needs additional information from the advertiser/user before the review can be completed.
If the reviewer provided specific instructions, they should be available in moderation comments. - ESCALATION_REVIEW: The creative, or the additional information provided for it, is under escalation review.
This typically means the case requires additional review beyond the standard moderation path. - APPEALED: A rejected creative was appealed by the advertiser/user and has moved back into the pending approval / moderation flow for re-review. - NEW_INFO_PROVIDED: The advertiser/user has submitted additional information for the creative, usually after more information was requested or as part of an escalation workflow.
The creative remains in moderation while the newly submitted information is reviewed.

prohibitedContentsCount.description: Number of total prohibited content comments

resolutionDate.description: Resolution date in MM/dd/yyyy (parsed as LocalDate)

advertiserId.description: The ID of the specific advertiser

type.description: Type of the claim Value: ACKNOWLEDGE, ADDITIONAL_INFO, APPEAL

acknowledge.description: If the GET /moderation-assist response includes acknowledgement items, the acknowledge field is required and should be set to true

advertiserId.description: The ID of the specific advertiser

prohibitedContents.description:
This field currently returns an empty array [].
It is reserved for prohibited content findings that may be returned in a future release.

acknowledgementClaims.description: List of claims requiring acknowledgement after submission

substantiationClaims.description: List of claims requiring substantiation after submission

altText.description: List of suggested alt-text for each ad unit image

metric.description: Impressions is the only value supported

count.description: optional - to return the 1st ten itemsetAssociations set startIndex=0 & defaultCount=100, maxCount=100, minCount=1

ItemsetUpdateRequest.description: with measurment class itemeset, only item based itemset is allowed

ItemsetCreateRequest.description: with measurement class itemeset, only item based itemset is allowed

showItems.description: default value is false, if it true it wil show list of items only when itemset is brand type

totalResults.description: Total number of results which satisfy the filtering criteria. This will help to support pagination.

advertiserId.description: Id of advertiser for which report is to be requested
Id of advertiser for which report is to be requested

ItemListRequest.description: API users can request list of items for an advertiserId using below filters

advertiserId.description: Value should be greater than and equal to 0. Default 0.

startIndex.description: Value should be greater than 0. Default 100.

isRestricted.description: filters for brand, category and subCategory are not supported when isRestricted = false

expandVariants.description: Controls whether to expand results to include related variants when filtering by itemId or gtin.

filter[department].description: taxon1_name is department. Supported 'EXACT' match. Case insensitive

filter[category].description: taxon2_name is category. Supported 'EXACT' match. Case insensitive

filter[subCategory].description: taxon3_name is sub-category. Supported 'EXACT' match. Case insensitive

startIndex.description: Value should be greater than and equal to 0. Default 0.

count.description: Value should be greater than 0. Default 100.

isRestricted.description: If false, brand name is mandatory.

TaxonomiesRequest.description: API users can request list of taxonomies using provided details and filters

advertiserId.description: request list of items for an advertiserId

startIndex.description: Value should be greater than and equal to 0. Default 0

count.description: Value should be greater than 0. Default 100.

filter[level].description: Acceptable value 1,2,3. Level is used to tell the taxon level to be shown in response

Filter[role].description: Specifies whether to return audiences that are either owned by the advertiser or shared with them.

lastUpdatedAt.description: timestamp in EST when the audience data was last refreshed

advertiserId.description: ID of advertiser to fetch recommendations for

filter[outcome].description: Filter by business outcome the recommendation is trying to improve

filter[recommendationIds].description: Filter by specific recommendation IDs.Use this to request only particular recommendations.Max size: 20.

filter[recommendationType].description:
Filter by type of change suggested.
  • BUDGET_REALLOCATION: proposed reallocation of budgets across entities
  • TARGETING: proposed changes to targeting (audiences, keywords, contextual)
  • SCHEDULE: proposed changes to an entity's schedule

viewMode.description: Controls how much detail is returned for each recommendation

ErrorResponse_1.description: Standard error response returned for validation and server failures

details.description: List of specific error codes describing the failure

totalResults.description: Total number of recommendations returned for the request criteria.

recommendations.description: List of recommendation objects matching the request criteria

advertiserId.description: The unique identifier of the advertiser

actions.description: Array of recommendation actions to be performed

results.description: List of results corresponding to each action.

CampaignPatchErrorCode.description: List of possible validation, business, and processing error codes for Campaign Patch operations

AdGroupFlattenedTargeting.description: Flattened targeting structure for full replacement. Use include/exclude arrays to fully replace targeting lists. Only one of keywords, contextual, behavioral, or runOfSite is allowed. geoTargets can be combined with any targeting tactic.

AdGroupFlattenedTargetingWithDelta.description: Flattened targeting structure with delta (incremental) updates. Use add/remove objects within include/exclude to modify keyword, contextual, audience, behavioral and geoTargets lists without replacing the entire list.

associatedItems.description: List of associated itemId, maximum list size is 5.

templateId.description: Template ID for the creative, only returned in v1 metadata response

templateName.description: Template name for the creative, only returned in v2 metadata response

status.description:
status represents the high-level lifecycle state of the creative: - DRAFT: The creative has been created or saved, but has not been submitted for moderation yet.
The user can continue editing the creative. Since the creative is not yet in the moderation - PENDING_APPROVAL: The creative has been submitted for moderation and is not yet in a final approved or rejected state.
When status=PENDING_APPROVAL, clients can use detailedStatus to understand the specific stage of the moderation workflow. - APPROVED: The creative has completed moderation and is approved for use. This is a final moderation outcome. - REJECTED: The creative has completed moderation and was rejected. This is a final moderation outcome.
If the user appeals the rejected creative, the creative may move back into the moderation flow with status=PENDING_APPROVAL.

detailedStatus.description:
Detailed moderation status of the creative: - CREATIVE_REVIEW: The creative is currently being reviewed by the moderation team. - NEEDS_MORE_INFORMATION: The reviewer needs additional information from the advertiser/user before the review can be completed.
If the reviewer provided specific instructions, they should be available in moderation comments. - ESCALATION_REVIEW: The creative, or the additional information provided for it, is under escalation review.
This typically means the case requires additional review beyond the standard moderation path. - APPEALED: A rejected creative was appealed by the advertiser/user and has moved back into the pending approval / moderation flow for re-review. - NEW_INFO_PROVIDED: The advertiser/user has submitted additional information for the creative, usually after more information was requested or as part of an escalation workflow.
The creative remains in moderation while the newly submitted information is reviewed.

adUnits.example: [brandboxDesktop, brandboxApp, marqueeDesktop, marqueeTablet, marqueeApp, galleryApp, galleryDesktop, skylineDesktop, skylineApp, skylineAppV2, skylineDesktopV2, skylineDesktopV3, skylineAppV3, skylineApp, tileDesktop, tileApp, checkInVideo, brandboxAppVideo, brandboxDesktopVideo]

templateName.description: Template type for the creative. Null for non-template creatives.

evidence.description: Content that was interpreted as prohibited content

AdUnitV2.description: Ad Unit schema supporting multiple ad unit types with varying property requirements. Each property description indicates which ad unit types support that property. All Properties are optional in PATCH /creatives/:id call

adUnitName.description:
**Required for all ad units.** Specifies the type of ad unit being created.

**Desktop units:** marqueeDesktop, brandboxDesktop, galleryDesktop, tileDesktop, skylineDesktop, skylineDesktopV2, skylineDesktopV3, brandboxDesktopVideo, marqueeTablet
**App units:** marqueeApp, tileApp, brandboxApp, galleryApp, skylineApp, skylineAppV2, skylineAppV3, brandboxAppVideo
**Video units:** checkInVideo, brandboxAppVideo, brandboxDesktopVideo, f4Video

headline.description:
**Required for most ad units.** The main headline text for the ad unit.

**Required for:** All non-video ad unit types and brandboxVideoDesktop, brandboxVideoApp and f4Video ad units
**Not supported by:** checkInVideo or marqueeTablet
**Validation:** Must be at least 1 character long
**Max length:** 25 characters for f4Video; varies for other ad units

logoAltText.description:
**Required for most ad units.** Alternative text for the logo image for accessibility.

**Required for:** All non-video ad unit types and brandboxVideoDesktop and brandboxVideoApp
**Not supported by:** checkInVideo, f4Video
**Optional for marqueeTablet
**Max length:** 150 characters
**Validation:** Must be at least 1 character long

legalDisclaimerPopUpCopy.description:
**Optional for most ad units.** Legal disclaimer text that appears in a popup.

**Supported by:** All ad unit types including all video units (checkInVideo, brandboxAppVideo, brandboxDesktopVideo, f4Video), but not marqueeTablet
**Max length:** 4000 characters
**Default:** null

legalDisclaimerLabel.description:
**Optional for most ad units.** Label text for the legal disclaimer link.

**Supported by:** All ad unit types including all video units (checkInVideo, brandboxAppVideo, brandboxDesktopVideo, f4Video)
**Max length:** 15 characters
**Note:** Requires legalDisclaimerPopUpCopy to also be provided
**Default:** null

legalDisclaimerText.description:
**Optional for all ad units.** Legal disclaimer text content.

**Supported by:** All non-video ad unit types
**Not supported by:** checkInVideo, brandboxAppVideo, brandboxDesktopVideo, f4Video
**Max length:** 600 characters
**Default:** null

images.description:
**Required for most ad units.** Array of image objects for the ad unit.

**Required for:** All non-video ad unit types and brandboxVideoDesktop and brandboxVideoApp, but optional for marqueeTablet
**Not supported by:** checkInVideo, f4Video
**Validation:** Must contain at least one image (logo image is mandatory)

subhead.description:
**Required for some ad units, optional for others.** Sub-headline text that appears below the main headline.

**Required for:** marqueeDesktop, brandboxDesktop, galleryDesktop, tileDesktop, brandboxApp, brandboxAppVideo, brandboxDesktopVideo
**Optional for:** marqueeApp, tileApp, skylineDesktop, skylineDesktopV2, skylineDesktopV3, skylineApp, skylineAppV2, skylineAppV3, galleryApp
**Not supported by:** checkInVideo, f4Video
**Format:** Should end with a period, asterisk, exclamation point, or question mark

cta.description:
**Supported by some ad units only.** Call-to-action button text.

**Required for:** marqueeDesktop, brandboxDesktop, galleryDesktop, tileDesktop, brandboxAppVideo, brandboxDesktopVideo, f4Video
**Optional for:** marqueeApp, tileApp, brandboxApp, galleryApp
**Not supported by:** skylineDesktop, skylineDesktopV2, skylineDesktopV3, skylineApp, skylineAppV2, skylineAppV3, checkInVideo
**Max length:** 16 characters (10 characters for f4Video)
**Format:** Sentence case

imageAltText.description:
**Required for most ad units, optional for skyline units.** Alternative text for the main ad images for accessibility.

**Required for:** marqueeDesktop, brandboxDesktop, galleryDesktop, tileDesktop, marqueeApp, tileApp, brandboxApp, galleryApp, skylineDesktopV3, skylineAppV3
**Optional for:** skylineDesktop, skylineDesktopV2, marqueeTablet
**Not supported by:** checkInVideo, brandboxAppVideo, brandboxDesktopVideo, f4Video
**Max length:** 150 characters

backgroundColorHex.description:
**Supported by V3 skyline units only.** Background color for the ad unit in hexadecimal format (e.g., #FF0000).

**Supported by:** skylineDesktopV3, skylineAppV3
**Not supported by:** All other ad unit types including f4Video
**Format:** Hex color code

textColor.description:
**Supported by V3 skyline units only.** Text color for the ad unit.

**Supported by:** skylineDesktopV3, skylineAppV3
**Not supported by:** All other ad unit types including f4Video

videos.description:
**Required for video ad units only.** Array of video objects for the ad unit.

**Required for:** checkInVideo, brandboxAppVideo, brandboxDesktopVideo, f4Video
**Not supported by:** All other ad unit types
**Validation:** Must contain exactly one video object with name 'mainVideo'

or.description: this contains list containing combinations of brands, category & itemset objects
this contains list containing combinations of brands, category & Items objects

itemsetType.description: Enum Values: FEATURED, HALO.This will be present only for MEASUREMENT class itemsets

haloType.description: Enum Values: BRAND, CATEGORY, CUSTOM, NONE. This will be present only for HALO itemsetType

parentFeaturedItemsetId.description: This will be present only for HALO itemsetType

type.description: Enum values: ITEM, BRAND, CATEGORY, HYBRID

isShared.description: Indicates whether the itemset is shared with the advertiser (true) or owned by the advertiser (false)

type.description: Type of entity the ID refers to

status.description: List of recommendation status to filter on. Use this to include recommendations that were accepted, rejected, expired or active.Must contain at least 1 value.

RecommendationErrorCode.description: List of possible validation and business error codes

outcome.description: Business outcome this recommendation is designed to improve

expectedImpact.description: Metrics measuring the expected impact if the recommendation is applied. Returned only when available and viewMode = DETAILED

action.description: Details of the user action taken on this recommendation (if any). Returned only when available and viewMode = DETAILED

recommendationID.description: The unique identifier of the recommendation

action.description: The action to be taken on the recommendation

recommendationID.description: The unique identifier of the recommendation

action.description: The action that was taken on the recommendation

code.description: The status code indicating success or failure of the action

details.description: Array of detailed messages or error information related to the action result

id.description: Unique identifier for the review comment

name.description: Name identifier for the video. Must be 'mainVideo' for video ad units.

assetId.description: UUID of the uploaded video asset.

current.description: Current value of the metric without applying the recommendation

predicted.description: Predicted value of the metric after applying the recommendation

uplift.description: Difference between predicted and current, representing uplift based on forecasted impressions/sales/clicks

proposal.description: Contains the recommended changes for a recommendation. Its shape depends on recommendationType. Exactly one of the following properties is present based on recommendationType: - If recommendationType = TARGETING, proposal.targeting MUST be present - If recommendationType = BUDGET_REALLOCATION, proposal.budgetReallocation MUST be present - If recommendationType = SCHEDULE, proposal.scheduleRecommendation MUST be present - If recommendationType = BID, proposal.bid MUST be present

state.description: Type of action taken on the recommendation

actedAt.description: Timestamp when the action was taken. ISO8601 format (e.g. "2025-08-02T12:00:00Z")

trigger.description: Root object describing the recommendation trigger

triggerType.description: Describes the primary signal or event that caused the recommendation to be generated, i.e., the "why" behind the recommendation

gender.description: Either M or F can be provided, multiple values not accepted

income.description: (A -> 0 - 24999, B -> 25000 - 49999, C -> 50000 - 74999, D -> 75000 - 99999, E -> 100000 - 149999, F -> 150000 - 199999, G -> 200000+). The ranges should adhere to continuous values. Like-['B', 'C', 'D'] and not like ['B', 'D']. For All income, “income” should be omitted else exception will be thrown.

ageRange.description: 'A':(18 - 24) ,'B':(25 - 34), 'C':(35 - 44), 'D':(45 - 54), 'E':(55 - 64), 'F':(65+). The ranges should adhere to continuous values. Like-['B', 'C', 'D'] and not like ['B', 'D']. For All ageRange, 'ageRange' should be omitted else exception will be thrown.

id.description: ID of the parent entity, i.e. campaign id for the adgroup

type.description: Type of the parent entity. For entity.type = ADGROUP, parent.type = CAMPAIGN

subType.description: Type of detail that will be changed by the recommendation

inclusions.description: Inclusion list of targeting nodes to be added. Applicable only for TARGETING recommendations.

exclusions.description: Exclusion list of targeting nodes to be removed. Applicable only for TARGETING recommendations.

budgetReallocation.description: Proposal payload for reallocating budgets across entities. Applicable only when recommendationType = BUDGET_REALLOCATION.

reallocations.description: List of budget reallocation proposals across entities.

bid.description: Proposal payload for bid recommendations. Applicable only when recommendationType = BID.

currentValue.description: The current value of the bid

recommendedValue.description: The recommended value of the bid

action.description: Action to be taken on this targeting set

values.description: List of targeting nodes in the recommendation

reallocations.description: Details of the entity for which budget reallocation is recommended.

entityType.description: Type of the entity for which budget reallocation is recommended.

entityId.description: ID of the entity for which budget reallocation is recommended.

entityName.description: Name of the entity for which budget reallocation is recommended.

currentValue.description: Current value of the budget for the entity.

recommendedValue.description: Recommended value of the budget for the entity.

text.description: Keyword text value. Applicable only for type KEYWORD. Negative keywords are sent as part of exclusions.

matchType.description: Match type for keyword targeting. Applicable only for type KEYWORD.

id.description: ID of contextual target or audience. Applicable only for type BEHAVIORAL or CONTEXTUAL.

name.description: Name of contextual target or audience. Applicable only for type BEHAVIORAL or CONTEXTUAL.

AdGroupPatchRequest_targeting.description: Targeting criteria for the ad group. Exactly one of the three structures must be used per request; mixing structures is not supported. (1) Expression-based: Nested array element with targeting details (LogicalExpression). (2) Flattened: include/exclude arrays for full replacement (AdGroupFlattenedTargeting). (3) Flattened with delta: add/remove objects within include/exclude for incremental updates (AdGroupFlattenedTargetingWithDelta).

keywordText.description: Text that defines the negative keyword.

matchType.description: Only EXACT matchType is allowed for negative keywords.

exclude.description: Negative keywords. Only EXACT matchType is allowed for negative keywords.

id.description: ID of the audience from the targeting list endpoint.

attribute.description: Attribute of the audience (e.g. historical, predictive, lapsed_buyers, lifestyle, age, gender).

id.description: ID for Country, State, City, or DMA targets.

zipCode.description: ZIP code for zip code targeting (USA only).

AdGroupFlattenedTargeting_geoTargets.description: Geographic targeting. Can be combined with any targeting tactic. One of: Country, State/City, DMA, or Zip code. Cannot combine different geo-targeting types within a single ad group.

add.description: Keywords to add to the include list.

remove.description: Keywords to remove from the include list.

matchType.description: Only EXACT matchType is allowed for negative keywords.

AdGroupFlattenedTargetingWithDelta_keywo.description: Delta update for negative keywords. Only EXACT matchType is allowed.

add.description: Contextual nodes to add to the include list.

remove.description: Contextual nodes to remove from the include list.

add.description: Audiences to add to the include list.

remove.description: Audiences to remove from the include list.

add.description: Audiences to add to the exclude list.

remove.description: Audiences to remove from the exclude list.

AdGroupFlattenedTargetingWithDelta_geoTa.description: Delta update for geographic locations to target.

add.description: Geographic locations to add to the include list.

remove.description: Geographic locations to remove from the include list.

AdGroupFlattenedTargetingWithDelta_geoTa.description: Geographic targeting with delta updates. One of: Country, State/City, DMA, or Zip code.

evidence.description: Content that was interpreted as prohibited content
Content that was interpreted as prohibited content

item_count.description: the count corresponds to how many items are there for that node at that level.

userActions_dateTimeRange.description: Restricts results to a date range based on the recommendation’s action/expiry timestamp. Note: Required field when status includes any of ACCEPTED, REJECTED, EXPIRED and optional when status is only ACTIVE.

startDate.description: Start timestamp (inclusive). Recommendations actioned on or after this time are included. ISO-8601 format (e.g. 2025-07-18T08:00:00Z)

endDate.description: End timestamp (inclusive). Recommendations on or before this time are included. Must be: • not after the current time • not before dateTimeRange.startDate
